name: Doggie Liver Treats
recipeIngredient: 1 Box corn muffin mix (Martha White works well)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to the temperature specified in the corn muffin recipe.
2. In a blender or food processor, combine the raw liver and garlic until smooth. Mix with the corn muffin mix.
3. Spread the mixture onto a cookie sheet and pat into a layer about 1/2 to 1 inch thick.
4. Bake until firm but not burned.
5. Cut into squares.
6. Freeze if desired.
